name: Phoenix crossbow
rationale: Functional tradeable crossbow, classified by function as Range; dropped Quests.

name: Dramen staff
rationale: Its enduring use is fairy-ring/Zanaris access, a teleport function, so Teleports.

name: 'perfect' ring
rationale: A Family Crest quest ring with no use outside the quest, so Quests; dropped Crafting.

name: Cooking gauntlets
rationale: A Family Crest reward that reduces fish burning, so Cooking; dropped Quests.

name: Goldsmith gauntlets
rationale: Boosts gold-smelting XP, so Mining + Smithing; dropped Quests.

name: Chaos gauntlets
rationale: Boosts bolt-spell damage, so Mage; dropped Quests.

name: Steel gauntlets
rationale: Unenchanted Family Crest hand slot with melee defence, so Melee; dropped Quests.

name: Bronze dart tip
rationale: Smithed tip whose only next step is fletching, so Fletching only; dropped Mining + Smithing.

name: Iron arrow
rationale: Finished arrow used in ranged combat, so Range; dropped Fletching.

name: Bear fur
rationale: Wiki recheck: crafted into wooden cats and fur heads, so Crafting (corrected from Misc).

name: Silk
rationale: A Thieving-stall trade good with no crafting recipe, sold not consumed, so Misc.

name: Rock
rationale: A failed-limestone-brick byproduct with no further use, so Misc; dropped Crafting.

name: Machete
rationale: A Woodcutting jungle tool; the Fletching tag was a stale combined-tab artifact.

name: Cape of legends
rationale: Per the cape rule, a defensive cape shows in all three combat styles; dropped Quests.

name: Green d'hide chaps
rationale: Finished dragonhide legwear, no further crafting step, so Range; dropped Crafting.

name: Bronze chainbody
rationale: Finished smithed melee armour leaves Mining + Smithing for Melee.

name: Dragon sq shield
rationale: A strong tradeable melee shield with genuine use, so Melee; dropped Quests.

name: Iron pickaxe
rationale: A Mining tool; primary use is mining, so Mining + Smithing; dropped Melee.

name: Iron axe
rationale: A Woodcutting hatchet, a skilling tool, so Woodcutting + Firemaking only.

name: Iban's staff
rationale: A usable quest-reward magic weapon (Iban Blast), so Mage; dropped Quests.

name: Black mace
rationale: A melee weapon; its minor prayer bonus does not make it Prayer gear, so Melee.

name: Archery ticket
rationale: A Ranging Guild reward token (currency), not gear, so Misc; dropped Range.

name: Dry sticks
rationale: Kept after the quest for Firemaking torch-lighting, so Woodcutting + Firemaking; dropped Quests.

name: Amulet of accuracy
rationale: Boosts all attack styles; non-style-specific jewellery spans the three combat tabs; dropped Quests.

name: Logs
rationale: Burned by Firemaking and fletched into bows; dropped Construction.

name: Grimy snake weed
rationale: A herb cleaned and used in Herblore, not farmed, so Herblore; dropped Quests.
comments: This herb is used to make quest specific potions in 3 different quests. I think this is the litmus for "If an item is not quest-only, take it out of quests". Are we happy with that direction?

name: Anti-dragon shield
rationale: A style-agnostic dragonfire shield used in all combat styles; dropped Quests.

name: Garlic
rationale: Used in Cooking (spicy sauce) and Herblore (Guthix balance); dropped Quests.

name: Diamond
rationale: A cut gem set into jewellery (Crafting) and chiselled into bolt tips (Fletching).

name: Crushed gem
rationale: A failed-gem-cut byproduct with no further use, so Misc; dropped Crafting.

name: Amulet of glory(4)
rationale: All-styles combat amulet with teleport charges; dropped Misc and Slayer.

name: Holy symbol
rationale: A blessed Saradomin symbol with a prayer bonus, so Prayer; dropped Quests.

name: Amulet of defence
rationale: All-styles defence amulet; non-style-specific jewellery spans the three combat tabs.

name: Chisel
rationale: A tool used in Crafting (gems, limestone) and Fletching (gem bolt tips); dropped Misc.

name: Bow string
rationale: A spun string consumed by Fletching to string bows; dropped Crafting as the spun output.

name: Flax
rationale: Spun into bow string via Crafting; dropped Fletching as flax itself is not fletched.

name: Wizard's mind bomb
rationale: A brewed ale that boosts Magic, so Cooking plus Mage.

name: Cooked meat
rationale: A cooked edible food, so Cooking plus all four combat tabs per the food rule.

name: Lava eel
rationale: A cooked edible fish, so Cooking plus all four combat tabs; dropped Quests.

name: Curry
rationale: A finished edible food (heals 19), so Cooking plus all four combat tabs.

name: Veg ball
rationale: A finished edible gnome food, so Cooking plus all four combat tabs.

name: Bucket
rationale: A multi-skill vessel; dropped Misc.
